# Backend API Docs

This page documents the FastAPI service, GitHub webhook receiver, LLM processing pipeline, Notion integration, review APIs, deployment configuration, and operational behavior.

# Frontend Dashboard Docs

This page documents the Next.js review dashboard, production setup panel, review queue, job detail view, approval flow, rejection flow, and Vercel deployment configuration.

# DocuSync Project Docs

This page documents project-level configuration, module mapping, deployment guides, onboarding material, production checklist, and research-project documentation.
